title: Low-Poly Dungeon Hero
description: A beautifully animated low-poly warrior character complete with animations for running, attacking, and idle states.
author: AlexPixel
content: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KhronosGroup/glTF-Sample-Models/master/2.0/Duck/glTF/Duck.gltf

title: Stylized Water Shader
description: An optimized water shader with depth fading, foam lines, and vertex wave displacement. Works great for mobile and low-poly styles.
author: ShaderChef

title: Retro Third-Person Controller
description: A simple, lightweight C# script for Unity to handle retro-style third-person movement with Rigidbody dynamics. Perfect for adventure and platformer games.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: Sci-Fi Hover Vehicle
description: A highly optimized futuristic hovercraft model styled in low-poly cyber aesthetic. Fits perfectly into sci-fi racers or ambient hovercraft games.
author: NetRunner
content: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KhronosGroup/glTF-Sample-Models/master/2.0/CesiumMilkTruck/glTF/CesiumMilkTruck.gltf

title: openassets.studio MCP Connection Template
description: Standard Model Context Protocol (MCP) server integration template for connecting Cursor, Claude Desktop, or your game engine's AI assistant directly to openassets.studio APIs to search, download, and paste assets.
author: OpenAssets Core

title: Space Kit (Kenney)
description: Over 150 low-poly 3D models for space station exploration and lunar base layouts. Includes modular corridors, spacecraft components, base structures, solar panels, and astronaut gear.
author: Kenney

title: Scribble Platformer (Kenney)
description: A beautifully hand-drawn 2D asset pack. Over 200 platformer tiles, interactive items, animated characters, traps, hazard objects, and matching doodle UI elements.
author: Kenney

title: Tiny Dungeon (Kenney)
description: A complete 16x16 pixel-art classic dungeon tileset. Includes over 100 tiles for brick walls, wooden floors, stone arches, chests, key items, animated enemies, and hero classes.
author: Kenney

title: Nature Kit (Kenney)
description: An expansive collection of low-poly modular 3D models for creating organic nature scenes. Contains over 180 models including fir trees, blossoming bushes, boulders, logs, and water stream panels.
author: Kenney

title: Procedural Starfield Scene
description: A highly performant procedural starfield script utilizing custom vertex and fragment shaders with ThreeJS Particle Systems. Renders an immersive, infinitely wrapping deep-space cosmos.
author: ThreeJSAssets

title: Low-Poly Sedan GLTF Model
description: A beautifully balanced low-poly standard sedan car model. Standard UV layout, lightweight vertices, rigged wheels, and ready to deploy in any Three.js WebGL scene container.
author: ThreeJSAssets

title: Pirate Kit (Kenney)
description: Over 135 low-poly modular assets for building high-seas harbors, galleons, and tropical pirate coves. Includes cannons, treasure chests, rowboats, docks, and pirate flags.
author: Kenney

title: Castle Kit (Kenney)
description: Over 160 low-poly modular pieces for towers, castle walls, gates, dungeon grates, bridges, banners, and medieval battlements. Ideal for RPG and tactical strategy setups.
author: Kenney

title: Car Kit (Kenney)
description: A collection of 60 voxel-style modular vehicles. Includes police cruisers, ambulances, sports cars, muscle cars, delivery vans, and semi trucks with rotatable wheels.
author: Kenney

title: Weapon Kit (Kenney)
description: An assortment of 50+ low-poly melee weapons, shields, and ranged equipment. Includes broadswords, battle axes, medieval bows, steel shields, and wizard staves.
author: Kenney

title: Furniture Kit (Kenney)
description: More than 150 low-poly interior models for designing cozy houses, messy offices, or retro game rooms. Includes sofas, desks, kitchen cabinets, TVs, and house plants.
author: Kenney

title: Low-Poly Pine Tree
description: A single optimized Pine Tree model with stylized branch leaves. Low vertex count make it suitable for rendering massive procedural forests without performance impact.
author: ThreeJSAssets

title: Sci-Fi Starfighter Spacecraft
description: A high fidelity combat spaceship. Featuring detailed textures, emission maps for boosters, and a sleek aerodynamic structure ready for space sims.
author: ThreeJSAssets

title: Retro Arcade Cabinet Model
description: A retro-themed 80s arcade machine model. Includes glowing screen shader mapping coordinates and neon cabinet artwork templates.
author: ThreeJSAssets

title: Cyberpunk Lightcycle
description: A highly stylized futuristic motorbike with neon glowing rims. Highly optimized for high-speed racing gameplay pipelines.
author: ThreeJSAssets

title: City Kit (Kenney)
description: Build high-density metropolis grids using over 250 voxel assets including skyscrapers, roads, traffic lights, cars, parks, and civilian models.
author: Kenney

title: Pixel Platformer (Kenney)
description: A complete retro 2D 16x16 side-scroller tileset. Features grassy terrain blocks, floating clouds, collectable coins, spikes, portals, and animated blob heroes.
author: Kenney

title: RPG UI Pack (Kenney)
description: More than 150 UI elements matching fantasy RPG games. Includes parchment-style borders, metallic buttons, glowing progress bars, cursors, and gold shield frames.
author: Kenney

title: Fantasy Spell Icons (Kenney)
description: Over 200 flat design spell, action, and item icons. Includes potion bottles, scroll spells, shields, swords, armor pieces, lock keys, and gem configurations.
author: Kenney

title: Roguelike Retro Characters (Kenney)
description: A 16x16 retro tile block of classic ASCII and graphical roguelike sprites. Contains monsters, heroes, potions, scrolls, weapons, and chest sprites.
author: Kenney

title: Crosshairs Pack (Kenney)
description: A vector pack containing 200 modern, sci-fi, and military crosshairs for first-person shooters, arcade cabinets, or flight simulator HUDs.
author: Kenney

title: Match-3 Puzzle Sprites (Kenney)
description: A matching puzzle asset pack. Includes colored gems, candy shapes, bubbles, tiles, numbers, and splash/pop effects for mobile puzzle games.
author: Kenney

title: VFX Particle Sprites
description: A high-quality spritesheet of voxelized particles for smoke, explosive combustion, electrical sparks, and magical healing halos.
author: ThreeJSAssets

title: Steampunk 2D Tileset (Kenney)
description: Voxel-like isometric 2D steampunk assets. Includes copper steam pipes, pressure gauges, mechanical gears, coal boilers, and matching copper UI widgets.
author: Kenney

title: Holographic HUD Assets (Kenney)
description: Futuristic UI overlay elements. Glowing radar grids, circular crosshairs, scientific graphs, holographic error panels, and status bars.
author: Kenney

title: Nebula 360 Skybox Texture
description: High resolution panoramic cubemap texturing of deep cosmic space with purple nebula gas and sparkling galaxies.
author: ThreeJSAssets

title: Cel-Shaded Outline Post-Effect
description: Screen space edge detection shader for pixelated toon outline borders. Works beautifully for rendering cartoon-styled mesh shapes.
author: ShaderChef

title: Hologram Fresnel Scanner Shader
description: Dynamic holographic matrix outline shader featuring scanning horizontal lines, random flickering distortions, and custom edge Fresnel highlights.
author: ShaderChef

title: Molten Lava Flow Shader
description: An animated molten hot lava texture distortion shader. Renders organic slow-moving glowing rivers with noise-based bubbling heat distortion ripples.
author: ShaderChef

title: Dynamic Wind-Sway Grass Shader
description: Lightweight grass vertex displacement shader. Computes smooth sine wind waves with customizable speed, bending intensity, and world-space wind direction.
author: ShaderChef

title: Matrix Digital Rain Screen-Shader
description: A screen-space post-processing shader generating retro digital rain code cascades. Fits nicely into sci-fi and cyberpunk terminals.
author: ShaderChef

title: CRT Monitor Retro Filter Shader
description: Post-processing shader introducing curved barrel screen projection, vintage analog horizontal scanlines, RGB chromatic split separation, and noise flicker.
author: ShaderChef

title: Procedural Stylized Flame Shader
description: Realistic procedural fire billboard shader utilizing multi-layered Voronoi noise erosion coordinates to output beautiful flickering campfires.
author: ShaderChef

title: Dynamic Snow Accumulation Shader
description: Calculates mesh upwards-facing normals relative to world space to paint procedural white snow accumulation with customizable depth thickness layers.
author: ShaderChef

title: Procedural Dungeon Grid Generator
description: A C# generator for building modular dungeon tile grids with randomized room layouts, connected path corridors, and designated key/chest placement parameters.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: Grid-Based Inventory Manager
description: A pure TypeScript utility implementation of classic RPG inventory columns with stacking mechanics, weight limitations, and custom JSON export profiles.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: Decaying Camera Shake Controller
description: A C# / JS utility calculating camera offset shaking vectors based on Perlin noise maps. Decays automatically using smooth easing equations.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: Day & Night Sky Rotator
description: A lightweight rotation timer for cyclical skies. Updates sun directional light angles and dynamically interpolates sky colors.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: A* Pathfinding Implementation
description: A high-performance JS/TS grid pathfinder calculating short paths through structural grid barriers. Features heuristics optimizations.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: Screen Transition Fader Panel
description: A flexible transition system with adjustable in/out timing and custom ease interpolators. Works great for switching scenes seamlessly.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: Retro Dialogue & Text Typer Node
description: A typewriter sound-sync text player parsing sequential line matrices. Includes branching choices nodes and speeds tuning.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: Secure Client Save States Manager
description: A modular data state manager serialization engine utilizing client side storage alongside compact base64 data packing.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: CPU-Optimized Particle Emitter
description: A reusable particle pooling emitter engine for high performance visual sparks, magical circles, or explosion splash effects.
author: CodeAdventurer

title: Claude Desktop App MCP Server Integration
description: A connection bundle template enabling Claude Desktop App users to communicate directly with structural assets registry indexes.
author: OpenAssets Core

title: VS Code & Cursor MCP Tool Definition
description: A standard JSON schema and workspace profile configuration defining tool parameters, validation, and JSON-RPC channels.
author: OpenAssets Core

title: Godot Engine Editor MCP Integration
description: An editor-side tool definition enabling dynamic AI-assisted fetching and asset pipeline integration straight inside the Godot workspace.
author: OpenAssets Core
